title: Zapier for shared boards
excerpt: Can we subscribe zapier to our boards so we can automate on shared or private boards?

posts.author: SimonLang (Simon Lang)
posts.cookedHtml: Can we subscribe zapier to our boards so we can automate on shared or private boards?

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Simon,

Can you expand on your question? Not sure I understood!

posts.author: SimonLang (Simon Lang)
posts.cookedHtml: When I am working in Zapier only main boards are showing as visible. I don’t see any of my private or shared boards that I am subscribed too.

posts.author: Lisa-monday.com (Lisa Ceccato)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @SimonLang,

Lisa here When accessing the API token in your admin section, you’d want to select the personal API token underneath API V1. This will give you access to your private/ shareable boards.
